title: Amethyst Infused Items
description: Add new items made of amethyst.
body:
[
![open_for_commission](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/htqpg9tm66jj27g0gjsbd/comission.png?rlkey=cwfa6r72f8m6fg23jch6ylyi0&st=w3x86wi9&dl=1)
](https://www.fiverr.com/s/gDe5gQb)

# Make Amethyst powerful in your world !
![amethyst_infused_items_banner](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/fkdt8jr7prp3te6dqnpct/amethyst_infused_items_banner.png?rlkey=6p3akwavz7ofyuqilue5rt5ow&st=o48kg0iy&dl=1)

## Description
Amethyst reforged items is a datapack/mod who adds new items made from amethyst to give it more usefulness.

I'm trying to make this datapack/mod as vanilla friendly as possible.
This is just the beginning; further additions may come later in future updates.

### ⚠ WARNING ⚠
- For Fabric version [FabricAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) is needed.
- For the datapack version a resource pack is needed.
- Datapack and mod are only translated in english and french.

## Features
Adds **Amethyst apple**, **Enchanted amethyst apple**, **Amethyst arrow**, **Enchanted echo shard apple** & **Photovoltaic Catalyst.**

<details>
<summary>More informations</summary>

#### ![amethyst_apple](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/lnx1eqpr95on9idfjz08e/apple.png?rlkey=wwqzlgn552t2l4o7g9lfkv377&st=9saq1bnm&dl=1) Amethyst apple
When eaten, clears blindness and darkness effects and gives regeneration and speed. If you have glowing, clears the glowing effect, spreads glowing around the player, and gives invisibility.
```
loot give @s loot amethyst_powered_item:amethyst_apple
```


#### ![amethyst_apple](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/lnx1eqpr95on9idfjz08e/apple.png?rlkey=wwqzlgn552t2l4o7g9lfkv377&st=9saq1bnm&dl=1) Enchanted amethyst apple
When eaten, gives a custom effect **Light shield**. As long as the player has absorption effect, gives glowing, night vision, and immunity to darkness and blindness. When an entity hits a player with **Light shield**, it has a chance to give glowing and weakness.
```
loot give @s loot amethyst_powered_item:enchanted_amethyst_apple
```

#### ![amethyst_arrow](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/1l5svkvh3lootfte62ghw/arrow.png?rlkey=rcarsy84gepho2ep48y6x73no&st=8yjnm5nv&dl=1) Amethyst arrow
Has natural piercing and higher damage.
```
loot give @s loot amethyst_powered_item:amethyst_arrow
```

#### ![enchanted_echo_shard_apple](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/ia050bhqn8hgf7ny6bbzx/echo.png?rlkey=jj3di55susf3xlbbpdxpo7xnz&st=qqs5yt7z&dl=1) Enchanted echo shard apple
When eaten, has a small charging time and the player can perform a sonic boom like the warden. (With the gamerule mob_griefing false, the sonic boom won't break blocks)
```
loot give @s loot amethyst_powered_item:enchanted_echo_apple
```

#### Photovoltaic Catalyst
When placed next or on top of a Furnace, Blast Furnace or Smoker, this block uses sunlight as fuel. It works only during the day and requires direct access to the sky with no blocks blocking the sunlight (like daylight detector).
```
loot give @s loot amethyst_powered_item:photovoltaic_catalyst
```

#### ![amethyst_carrot](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/p0ntvayzvp3oz8tvmr0wh/carrot.png?rlkey=x0icrd5mbml9cb0f32sn9b3nk&st=34zr68e6&dl=1) Amethyst Carrot
When eaten, show the closest ores during a short time.

</details>
